# i-have-adhd synchronization

This fork-owned control plane synchronizes
`ayghri/i-have-adhd/skills/i-have-adhd/` into
`skills/productivity/i-have-adhd/`.

The upstream root `LICENSE` is installed beside the skill. The adapter forces
explicit-only invocation in both `SKILL.md` and `agents/openai.yaml`. Every
update is proposed through a pull request and requires human review.

`upstream-lock.json` records the exact source commit and upstream inventory.
